heroSubtitle: Transforming residential and commercial spaces into stunning, functional masterpieces. Experience luxury living with 7 Star Interior.
address: 372, SMT LALMUNI DEVI, RAJDEO SINGH, Devi Asthan Rd, Jaganpura, EAST R, K NAGAR, Patna, Bihar 800027
whatsappMessage: Hi 7 Star Interior, I would like to discuss a project.

about.heading: Crafting Spaces With Soul & Purpose
about.paragraph1: Based in the heart of Patna, 7 Star Interior is a premier design studio dedicated to transforming ordinary spaces into extraordinary environments. With over a decade of excellence, we bring your vision to life with uncompromising quality.
about.paragraph2: Our philosophy is simple: exceptional design should be both breathtakingly beautiful and perfectly functional. From conceptualization to the final reveal, our expert team manages every detail, ensuring a seamless journey to your dream space.
highlights: Unmatched attention to detail and craftsmanship
Transparent pricing with no hidden costs
Dedicated project manager for every client

services.title: Residential Interior
services.description: Complete home interiors that reflect your personal style and enhance comfort.

services.title: Modular Kitchen
services.description: Smart, ergonomic, and stylish kitchen designs that make cooking a joy.

services.title: Office Interior
services.description: Inspiring workspaces designed to boost productivity and reflect your brand.

services.title: Home Renovation
services.description: Breathe new life into your existing spaces with our expert remodeling.

services.title: Turnkey Projects
services.description: End-to-end execution. You hand us the keys, we hand you a finished home.

services.title: 3D Visualization
services.description: See your space before it's built with our highly realistic 3D renderings.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.text: 7 Star Interior completely transformed our 3BHK. Their attention to detail and adherence to timeline was impressive. The modular kitchen is the highlight of our home.

testimonials.name: Anjali Singh
testimonials.text: Very professional team. They understood my vision for a modern minimalist living room and executed it perfectly. Highly recommend their services in Patna.

testimonials.name: Vikash Sharma
testimonials.text: We hired them for our office interior. The space utilization and aesthetic appeal they achieved within our budget was beyond our expectations.

testimonials.name: Neha Gupta
testimonials.text: The 3D visualization helped us understand the design before execution. The final result looks exactly like the render! Excellent craftsmanship.

testimonials.name: Saurabh Mishra
testimonials.text: Turnkey service at its best. Being out of town, I handed over my flat to them and they managed everything from civil work to final decor beautifully.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, budget, and timeline.

process.title: Design Planning
process.description: Creating layouts and mood boards for your space.

process.title: 3D Visualization
process.description: Realistic 3D renders to finalize the look.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: Choosing premium finishes, fabrics, and furniture.

process.title: Execution
process.description: Our expert craftsmen bring the design to life.

process.title: Handover
process.description: Final walkthrough and handing over your dream space.

blog.title: How to Choose the Right Interior Style
